title: Magic forest idea — kids beg Mama for an adventure
prompt: Mid-shot in @kitchen-morning, soft warm light from the back window. @Mama already at the kitchen island holding a coffee mug, leaning against the counter. @Sara already on the LEFT-FOREGROUND in front of the island, hands clasped together pleadingly under her chin, soccer cleats still on. @Eva already on the RIGHT-FOREGROUND next to her sister, vibrating with excitement, bouncing on her toes, soccer ball tucked under her arm. Sara (eyes huge, hands clasped, pleading): "Mama, can we go on an ADVENTURE to the MAGIC FOREST today?" Eva (jumping in place, hands fluttering): "PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE!" Mama (one eyebrow raised, tiny smile, sipping coffee): "An adventure to the WHAT now?" Sara (super serious): "MAGIC. FOREST." Eva (eyes huge, whisper-shouting): "It has unicorns! PROBABLY!" Mama (laughing softly, setting down mug): "...okay. Let's GO!" Both kids erupt: "YESSSSS!"
